## Summary

Describe the change and any reviewer context.

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat`, `fix`, `deps`, `docs`, `chore`, `refactor`, `test`, `build`, `ci`, `revert`)
- [ ] I used `!` in the PR title or added a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer if this release should take a breaking-version bump
- [ ] I updated `editors/vscode/CHANGELOG.md` if this changes extension-user-visible behavior
